case_title: PACIFIC GOURMET INC. et al VS SCHACHERN, MARK et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHACHERN, MARK
